description: Every FRED endpoint, plus a local SQLite store, offline search, and macro commands no other FRED tool has.

novel_features.name: Macro dashboard
novel_features.description: Latest value of a curated set of headline U.S. indicators (unemployment, CPI, GDP, fed funds, 10Y, payrolls) in one call.

novel_features.name: Series compare
novel_features.description: Pull observations for multiple series and align them by date into one table or JSON for correlation.

novel_features.name: Series latest
novel_features.description: The single most recent observation (date + value) for a series, as a one-liner.

novel_features.name: Watchlist
novel_features.description: Persist a set of series locally, sync their latest observations into SQLite, and report which ones moved since the last sync.

novel_features.name: Release calendar
novel_features.description: Recent and upcoming economic data release dates within a day window, aggregated across all releases.
